name: WF-8 · AI Content Generate (Gemini caption + Gemini image → Supabase Storage)

nodes.name: Gemini — Image
nodes.notes: Gemini image generation. Hasil: candidates[0].content.parts[].inlineData.data (base64 PNG). Pakai API key Gemini yang sama.

nodes.name: Upload → Supabase Storage
nodes.notes: Header Auth → Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer <SERVICE_ROLE_KEY>. Ganti GANTI_PROJECT dengan ref project (wbfqudrzwsnlzevxjlkm). Bucket content-images harus sudah dibuat (ai_contents.sql).

nodes.name: Build Final
nodes.notes: Ganti GANTI_PROJECT supaya sama dengan node Upload.
